item.title: 393rd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
I fixed this text from a hyper-pixelated, poorly-cropped meme
My additions
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Ken M is an International Treasure
Truth
mmmmmm
My addition
DISCLAIMER: Do not do violence
As weed gets more and more legal, you're going to get more and more weed memes from me
My additions
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: Bad day at the billiard hall.
item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: Not Safe For YOUR Work, Maybe
item.description:
But we're cool here.
I've had a couple of these days recently. Thank goodness my boss is awesome and she gets it.
We're a remote team, the weather is a weirdly frequent topic in our group chat.
One of us lives in New Orleans. I sent them this. Laughs were had by all.
This makes me think of a couple people we weren't all that sorry to see resign last year...
Heheheheheheh.
Fucken Billy.
Pulled this recently - "I've copied (BossLady) in case you have any further questions about our internal controls policies." He did not. It felt great.
So many clowns, so few circuses. Or something.
Out of a team of four, three of us are extremely queer and one of us is our phenomenally supportive boss. It's grand.
A level of pettiness I truly aspire to.
Happy Tuesday! What fresh hell today, team?
Snerk.
Fortunately we don't work for one of THOSE, but this kinda makes me wish we did...
Yeah, that's about how it's been so far.
I'm never one to pass up a good "could have been an email" joke
This would be a great signature line.
WHY IS NOBODY TALKING ABOUT THIS?
One of my coworkers has the most adorable baby I've ever seen. This is for her.
Have actually sent this to them already, I think...
Yes, we work with him, we refer to him by his full name plus the trademark symbol.
Saving this for a problem client we're ditching soon.
Text, email, same same.
Uh oh.
Or when certain people start piping up in team meetings...
Oops, gee whiz, oops.
Yesss, contempt of gender.
Genuinely might put this in my next OOO message.
This has big BossLady energy. Actually big Everyone On My Team energy.
And she's like "Look, I know this is dumb, you can tell me to fuck off if you don't wanna do it" lolll
Janet Loaf tax
Happy Old Man Chaucer. Lookit them biscuits.
item.dc:creator: ShipofRockets

But I’ll aLeo share different snippets on my Twitter! If you’d like to support me: Nsfw art : https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa Donations and commissions: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miaormoa Twitter: https://x.com/miahornyonmain

item.description:
mmm.. In N Out. greetings online friends
ok that's a pretty good costume
i need to read more SK
gotta be safe
i'm confused
yeah Dexter is troubling but don't overlook Shanna
teeth man
i would also attend this school
not again
umm, should we report this?
as if there aren't enough things that make me feel old
what a time to be alive
mmm hmm
we've all been there
i could've sworn they are legal
well that's extremely disturbing
always
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: At Japan’s dementia cafes, forgotten orders are all part of the service
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/p/Cz6W4E5uY4s/ https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2023/09/19/japan-aging-elderly-dementia-care/ This 12-seat cafe in Sengawa, a suburb in western Tokyo, hires elderly people with dementia to work as servers once a month. A former owner of the cafe has a parent with dementia, and the new owner agreed to let them rent out the space each month as a dementia cafe. The organizers now work with the local government to get connected to dementia patients in the area. It’s a safe space where they can interact with new people, be productive and feel needed — key to slowing down the progression of dementia, a neurodegenerative condition that has no cure.
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: Even near the end, the old man had character
item.description: My Dad wasn’t perfect, and I inherited that. But he was tough, and tough to the end. He was funny too, and I hope that I inherited that too.
item.dc:creator: DangerousToy

item.title: My 21-year-old Best Pal
item.description: I think you should all see this handsome, distinguished gentleman in his 21st year. This is Lockheed. He loves sleeping between legs, getting cheese treats, talking, looking at anything purple, and showing off his enormous paws. He’s my best puppy pal.
item.dc:creator: mikeoart101

item.title: ○ physics
item.description: Vortex Dynamics It is defined by the vorticity in the fluid, which measures the rate of local fluid rotation. Typically, the fluid circulates around the vortex, the speed increases as the vortex is approached and the pressure decreases. https://pubs.aip.org/aip/pof/article-abstract/35/8/085112/2905644/A-study-on-the-cavitation-vortex-dynamics-and?redirectedFrom=fulltext
item.dc:creator: eaglerider

item.title: F**k Greg Abbott, F**k the GQP!
item.description: There are exactly 285 days until Decision 2024 and there is lot's to be done! First things first .... register to vote / check your registration ... vote.org Secondly get involved, here are some handy links https://runforsomething.net/run/candidate-support-system/ https://www.turnoutpac.org/ https://justicedemocrats.com/ https://ballotpedia.org/Election_results,_2022:_Uncontested_races_by_state Why: https://www.axios.com/2023/11/13/trump-loyalists-2024-presidential-election EVERYTHING IS ON THE LINE!
item.dc:creator: theInternetismyplayground
